query:
SELECT id, ticker, transactionDate, transactionType, shares, pricePerShare, currency, fxRate, totalAmount, totalAmountCHF 
FROM portfolioTransactions 
WHERE ticker = 'NVDA' 
ORDER BY transactionDate DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT id, ticker, transactionDate, transactionType, shares, pricePerShare, currency, fxRate, totalAmount, totalAmountCHF 
FROM portfolioTransactions 
WHERE ticker = 'NVDA' 
ORDER BY transactionDate DESC 
LIMIT 10;
